name: omnisharp-extended-lsp.nvim
description: Extended 'textDocument/definition' handler for OmniSharp Neovim LSP (now also `textDocument/references`, `textDocument/implementation` and source generated files)
description_ja: OmniSharp Neovim LSP 向けの拡張 `textDocument/definition` ハンドラー（`textDocument/references`・`textDocument/implementation` およびソース生成ファイルにも対応）
